data.title: Inventor from Harvey, La. creates MUNCHCAP to protect hair while eating, reduces cleanup. #innovation #MUNCHCAP
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Harvey, Louisiana shared their innovation with the creation of the MUNCHCAP. This cap is designed to shield a child's hair from food, sauces, and liquids during mealtime, reducing cleanup efforts post-meals. The inventor aimed to streamline the daily routine by introducing this novel product.

data.title: USA Rail Terminals opens new rail terminal in Monroe, Louisiana to support Meta's data center project.
data.description: A new rail terminal in Monroe, Louisiana has recently started operations, managed by USA Rail Terminals. This facility aims to boost rail-to-truck logistics capacity for supporting construction work linked to Meta's Richland Parish Data Center in Holly. The center is expected to enhance data infrastructure in the area and foster economic growth.

SABA CAPITAL, WHICH OWNS 13.5% OF WORKSPACE GROUP, HAS URGED THE COMPANY’S BOARD TO APPROVE A MANAGED WIND-DOWN — INCLUDING SELLING ASSETS, REPAYING DEBT AND RETURNING CASH TO SHAREHOLDERS — BY FEB. 20, 2026.

data.title: Ashtrom Renewable Energy and OnPeak Power to end partnership in Austin; ARE is a renewable energy developer.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Austin, Texas, it was announced that Ashtrom Renewable Energy (ARE), a subsidiary of Ashtrom Group, and OnPeak Power, a renewable project developer, have entered into a partnership. ARE is known for being a renewable energy developer and independent power producer, while OnPeak is based in Austin, Texas and specializes in developing utility-scale renewable projects. This collaboration brings together two significant players in the renewable energy sector, with aims to leverage each other's expertise.

data.title: Veo 3.1 update by Google offers 4K video creation and enhanced mobile features for better AI video generation.
data.description: Google's artificial intelligence division, DeepMind, has unveiled the Veo 3.1 update. This release includes enhancements such as 4K upscaling, native vertical video support, and improved character consistency in AI-generated videos. This update aims to improve the overall quality of AI-generated videos by offering better resolution, support for vertical videos, and more consistent character appearances.

data.title: Revizto launches refreshed brand and new focus for growth in complex market. Headquarters in Lausanne, Switzerland.
data.description: The business is refining its public image in response to increasing complexity and limitations in project delivery. Based in LAUSANNE, Switzerland, as of January 13, 2026, Revizto is a top collaboration platform serving the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) industries.

data.title: eMaxx establishes Reciprocal Insurance Exchange in Arkansas, offering commercial property & casualty solutions for policyholders.
data.description: Based in Tampa, Florida, eMaxx is a Specialty Managing General Agent offering commercial property and casualty insurance solutions. Recently, they launched the eMaxx Reciprocal Insurance Exchange in Arkansas. This entity, owned by policyholder Subscribers, will function as both a reinsurer and insurer. It aims to provide commercial property and casualty insurance services. This move signifies eMaxx's strategic expansion and commitment to meeting the insurance needs of its clients.

data.title: Crude Oil spikes; US inflation steady at 2.7%. Dow down 0.60% to 49,293.33, NASDAQ up 0.17% to 13,773.29, S&P 500 down 0.08% to 6,971.95.
data.description: U.S. stocks were trading mixed as the Dow Jones index fell over 200 points on Tuesday, down 0.60% to 49,293.33. The NASDAQ, however, gained 0.17% to 23,773.29 while the S&P 500 dropped 0.08% to 6,971.95. Energy shares rose by 1.4%, while financial stocks dipped by 1.8%. Inflation remained steady in December, with the Consumer Price Index rising 2.7% year over year, meeting economist expectations. On a monthly basis, consumer prices increased by 0.3%. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase shares drop after Q4 results, Goldman Sachs predicts 2026 NII 2% above consensus, analyst reiterates Buy rating with $386 price target.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co (NYSE: JPM) recently announced its Q4 earnings which met expectations and projected its 2026 net interest income to be 2% higher than consensus estimates. Analysts at Goldman Sachs noted this guidance. JPMorgan Chase's stock has been declining from its recent highs, with pressure on the share price. Richard Ramsden, a Goldman Sachs analyst, maintained a Buy rating on JPMorgan Chase stock and set a price target of $386. The bank's performance and prospects regarding the same can be read in detail on financial news platform Benzinga.com.

data.title: SMDO 2026 economic development conference launched in Atlanta with theme "The Future in Motion", featuring world-class speakers.
data.description: Announced in Atlanta on January 13, 2026, The Collaborative Firm launched the South Metro Development Outlook Conference, the largest economic development conference in the Southeast region. This conference serves as a catalyst for creating jobs, fostering growth, promoting technology advancements, and increasing global business opportunities. The event is expected to attract a significant number of attendees and participants from various industries, contributing to the overall economic development of the region.

data.title: Inventor creates gadget to speed up repacking of rope bags for fire & rescue services. 100s of feet of rope can now be handled more efficiently.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Burlington Township, New Jersey shared a new innovation aimed at improving efficiency in fire and rescue services. The inventor, also a fire captain, addressed the challenge of reloading hundreds of feet of rope into bags, a time-consuming task. Seeking a solution to streamline this process, the inventor developed a method to repack rope bags more efficiently.
